Household Finance Corporation Of California'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Laurence L. Smith, Tel. 650.291.2737, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Laurence L. Smith's Claim of Exemption is granted in part. $50.00 will be withheld per each pay period. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Lawrence L. Smith Jr. judgment debtor in propria persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. Hearing on claim of exemption.
The leying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. The leying officer shall withhold the sum of $125.00 per pay period until further order of this Court, or satisfaction of judgment. ORDER SIGNED. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
